creator: john@saltant.com
text:
PHP 7.4 has been removed from the ports tree [0].

ownCloud's latest statement [1] indicates that ownCloud 10 will continue to require PHP 7.4 for the foreseeable future, though they also tease the possibility of a port to PHP 8.2 at an unspecified future date.

Good luck, sunpoet! Let us know if there is any way you think the rest of us could help.

[0] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=0d310d700aa060b02feec9c7487893a983bf7098
[1] https://central.owncloud.org/t/announcement-owncloud-10-and-php-versions/40251
